title: acalypha sabulicola
intro: Acalypha sabulicola, also known as sand acalypha, is a type of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant that is native to tropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Acalypha sabulicola can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical ointments, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine.
